Value: EUR5 single (29 days, no advance/last-min split)

Access fee shows weak demand elasticity: paid day-tripper daily avg fell 16,676 (2024) to 13,046 (2025) but city council attributes this to region-wide tourism decline, not fee deterrence; 2024 trial period saw daily numbers rise ~7,000. Day-tripper growth dampened modestly to +1.0%/yr.
